channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Israel bombs Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket attack
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israel Strikes Beirut After Hezbollah Attacks

- Israel Strikes Beirut After Hezbollah Attacks
- Huge blasts in Beirut as Israel says it was targeting Hezbollah command centres
- Israel launches strikes on Lebanon’s Beirut after Hezbollah fires missiles to enter West Asia conflict

- Israeli strikes hit Beirut suburbs, southern Lebanon, thousands displaced

- Lebanon: Israel trades fire with Hezbollah in south and east

- Israel strikes Lebanon’s capital, responding to missiles from Hezbollah
- Israel intensifies war on Lebanon after Hezbollah attack
- Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel
